tags.name: UserAccount
tags.description: User account administration and current-user endpoints.

get.summary: Get a page of the specific domain entity. Sorting and filtering is applied before paging
get.description:
Sorting: the sort parameter to sort the list of entities before paging the sort parameter is the name of the entity-model attribute to sort with a leading '-' sign for descending sort order. Note that not all entity-model attribute are suited for sorting while the most are.

Filter: The filter attributes accepted by this API depend on the actual entity model (domain object) and are of the form [domain-attribute-name]=[filter-value]. E.g.: name=abc or type=EXAM. Usually filter attributes of text type are treated as SQL wildcard with %[text]% to filter all text containing a given text-snippet.

parameters.name: page_number
parameters.description: The number of the page to get from the whole list. If the page does not exists, the API retruns with the first page.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: The size of the page to get.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: the sort parameter to sort the list of entities before paging

parameters.name: institutionId
parameters.description:
The institution identifier of the request.
Default is the institution identifier of the institution of the current user

Sorting: the sort parameter to sort the list of entities before paging the sort parameter is the name of the entity-model attribute to sort with a leading '-' sign for descending sort order. Note that not all entity-model attribute are suited for sorting while the most are.

Filter: The filter attributes accepted by this API depend on the actual entity model (domain object) and are of the form [domain-attribute-name]=[filter-value]. E.g.: name=abc or type=EXAM. Usually filter attributes of text type are treated as SQL wildcard with %[text]% to filter all text containing a given text-snippet.

parameters.name: page_number
parameters.description: The number of the page to get from the whole list. If the page does not exists, the API retruns with the first page.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: The size of the page to get.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: the sort parameter to sort the list of entities before paging

parameters.name: institutionId
parameters.description:
The institution identifier of the request.
Default is the institution identifier of the institution of the current user

 This can be used to verify depended objects for a certain bulk action to give a report of affected objects beforehand.
 For example for a delete action of a certain object, this gives all objects that will also be deleted within the deletion of the source object

parameters.name: modelId
parameters.description: The model identifier of the source entity object to geht the dependencies for.

parameters.name: bulkActionType
parameters.description:
The bulk action type defining the type of action to get the dependencies for.
This is the name of the enumeration

parameters.name: bulkActionAddIncludes
parameters.description:
Indicates if the following 'includes' parameter shall be processed or not.
 The default is false

parameters.name: bulkActionIncludes
parameters.description: A comma separated list of names of the EntityType enumeration that defines all entity types that shall be included in the result.

get.summary: Get a single entity by its modelId.

parameters.name: modelId
parameters.description: The model identifier of the entity object to get.

delete.description: To check or report what dependent object also would be deleted for a certain entity object, please use the dependency endpoint to get a report of all dependent entity objects.

parameters.name: bulkActionIncludes
parameters.description: A comma separated list of names of the EntityType enumeration that defines all entity types that shall be included in the result.

get.summary: Get a page of all specific domain entity that are currently inactive.
get.description:
Sorting: the sort parameter to sort the list of entities before paging
the sort parameter is the name of the entity-model attribute to sort with a leading '-' sign for
descending sort order. Note that not all entity-model attribute are suited for sorting while the most
are.

parameters.name: page_number
parameters.description: The number of the page to get from the whole list. If the page does not exists, the API retruns with the first page.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: The size of the page to get.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: the sort parameter to sort the list of entities before paging

parameters.description:
The institution identifier of the request.
Default is the institution identifier of the institution of the current user

EntityPrivilege.description: Entity-level privilege assigned to a user account.

ErrorCode.description: Catalogue of stable SEB Server APIMessage codes (the possible APIMessage.messageCode values).
x-enum-descriptions: Generic error message
Bad Request
UNAUTHORIZED
FORBIDDEN
resource not found
Illegal API request argument
Unexpected internal server-side error
Action would lied to an integrity violation
Field validation error
new password do not match confirmed password
Missing Password
Warnings from LMS
No Exam Supporter defined for the Exam
No SEB Exam Configuration defined for the Exam
SEB restriction API available but Exam not restricted on LMS side yet
No Indicator defined for the Exam
No Connection To LMS
There seems to be an invalid exam - course identifier reference. The course cannot be found
External binding error
Exam successfully imported but some additional initialization failed
Failed to automatically create pre-defined indicator(s) for the exam
Failed to automatically create pre-defined attributes for the exam
Failed to automatically apply SEB restriction for the exam to the involved LMS
Failed to automatically create pre-defined client group(s) for the exam
Failed to automatically apply SPS enabled setting to Exam Configuration
Failed to automatically create and link exam configuration from the exam template to the exam
Failed to automatically link auto-generated exam configuration to the exam
SEB client connection is not in valid state to apply requested operation
Some additional user confirmation needed

Error400BadRequest.description: Bad request, e.g. field validation or an illegal argument. The body is usually a list of APIMessage, but may be absent for some illegal-argument cases.

Error401Unauthorized.description: Unauthorized. Body is an APIMessage or a list of APIMessage.

Error403Forbidden.description: Forbidden. Body is a list of APIMessage.

Error404NotFound.description: Resource not found. Body is a list of APIMessage.

Error429TooManyRequests.description: Too many requests (rate limit). Body is the rate-limit code as plain text.

Error500InternalServerError.description: Unexpected internal server error. Body is a list of APIMessage.
